# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

build_job:
  stage: build
  script:
    - make build
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries/
      - configs/
  when: always

deployment_job_1:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  script:
    - make deploy-to-env-1
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries/
      - configs/
  when: always

deployment_job_2:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - build_job
  script:
    - make deploy-to-env-2
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries/
      - configs/
  when: always
